---
title: "Section Lookup Tool"
format: html
server: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(shiny)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
```

## Address Section Lookup

Type an address below to find out which section it falls in.

```{r}
#| panel: sidebar

# в”Җв”Җ File path в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
# Update this path to point to your GeoJSON file
GEOJSON_PATH <- "Maine_Voting_Districts_2021_US_Congress.geojson"

# в”Җв”Җ Section column в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
# Update this to the attribute name in your GeoJSON that identifies the section
# e.g. "section", "SECTION", "name", "district", etc.
SECTION_COLUMN <- "section"

textInput(
  "address",
  label    = "Enter an address:",
  value    = "",
  placeholder = "e.g. 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington DC"
)

actionButton("lookup", "Look Up Section", class = "btn-primary")
```

```{r}
#| panel: main

uiOutput("result_box")
leaflet::leafletOutput("map", height = "420px")
```

```{r}
#| context: server

# Load GeoJSON once on startup
sections <- reactive({
  req(file.exists(GEOJSON_PATH))
  st_read(GEOJSON_PATH, quiet = TRUE) |>
    st_transform(4326)   # ensure WGS84
})

# Geocode using the free Nominatim API (OpenStreetMap)
geocode_address <- function(address) {
  url <- modify_url(
    "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search",
    query = list(
      q      = address,
      format = "json",
      limit  = 1
    )
  )
  resp <- GET(url, user_agent("SectionLookupApp/1.0"))
  if (http_error(resp)) return(NULL)
  result <- fromJSON(content(resp, "text", encoding = "UTF-8"))
  if (length(result) == 0) return(NULL)
  list(lat = as.numeric(result$lat[1]),
       lon = as.numeric(result$lon[1]),
       display_name = result$display_name[1])
}

lookup_result <- eventReactive(input$lookup, {
  req(nchar(trimws(input$address)) > 0)

  withProgress(message = "Geocoding addressвҖҰ", value = 0.4, {
    geo <- geocode_address(trimws(input$address))
  })

  if (is.null(geo)) {
    return(list(status = "not_found", address = input$address))
  }

  point <- st_sfc(st_point(c(geo$lon, geo$lat)), crs = 4326)

  secs <- sections()
  idx  <- st_within(point, secs, sparse = FALSE)
  hit  <- which(apply(idx, 1, any))

  if (length(hit) == 0) {
    return(list(status  = "outside",
                address  = geo$display_name,
                lat      = geo$lat,
                lon      = geo$lon))
  }

  section_val <- secs[[SECTION_COLUMN]][hit[1]]

  list(
    status      = "found",
    address     = geo$display_name,
    section     = section_val,
    lat         = geo$lat,
    lon         = geo$lon,
    sections_sf = secs
  )
})

output$result_box <- renderUI({
  res <- lookup_result()

  box <- function(color, icon, heading, body) {
    tags$div(
      style = paste0(
        "border-left: 6px solid ", color, ";",
        "background:", color, "18;",
        "padding:16px 20px; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:16px;"
      ),
      tags$h4(style = paste0("color:", color, "; margin-top:0;"),
              tags$span(icon), " ", heading),
      tags$p(style = "margin:0; font-size:1rem;", body)
    )
  }

  switch(res$status,
    not_found = box("#c0392b", "вң—", "Address not found",
                    paste0('"', res$address, '" could not be geocoded.',
                           " Please check the spelling and try again.")),

    outside   = box("#e67e22", "вҡ ", "Outside all sections",
                    paste0(res$address,
                           " was located but does not fall within any section",
                           " in the GeoJSON file.")),

    found     = box("#27ae60", "вң“", paste0("Section: ", res$section),
                    paste0(res$address, " is in section ", res$section, "."))
  )
})

output$map <- leaflet::renderLeaflet({
  res <- lookup_result()
  req(res$status != "not_found")

  secs <- if (!is.null(res$sections_sf)) res$sections_sf else sections()

  pal <- leaflet::colorFactor(
    palette = c("#3498db", "#e74c3c", "#2ecc71", "#f39c12",
                "#9b59b6", "#1abc9c", "#e67e22", "#34495e"),
    domain  = secs[[SECTION_COLUMN]]
  )

  leaflet::leaflet() |>
    leaflet::addProviderTiles(leaflet::providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
    leaflet::addPolygons(
      data        = secs,
      fillColor   = ~pal(get(SECTION_COLUMN)),
      fillOpacity = 0.35,
      color       = "#2c3e50",
      weight      = 2,
      label       = ~as.character(get(SECTION_COLUMN)),
      highlightOptions = leaflet::highlightOptions(
        weight = 4, fillOpacity = 0.6, bringToFront = TRUE
      )
    ) |>
    leaflet::addLegend(
      position = "bottomright",
      pal      = pal,
      values   = secs[[SECTION_COLUMN]],
      title    = "Section"
    ) |>
    leaflet::addMarkers(
      lng   = res$lon,
      lat   = res$lat,
      popup = paste0("<b>", htmltools::htmlEscape(res$address), "</b>")
    ) |>
    leaflet::setView(lng = res$lon, lat = res$lat, zoom = 13)
})
```
